MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jul-03-2012 Continued To Oct-03-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT YVONNE SCARBOROUGH'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS.
Appearances: Michael M. Miles of Ballard Spahr LLP (702.868.7514) for defendant and moving party; Michael C. Starkey of the Adler Law Firm (433.5333) for plaintiff and responding party.
This matter was not argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to October 3, 2012 to give Plaintiff time to conduct jurisdictional discovery. Supplemental opposition papers must be filed by September 18, 2012. Supplemental reply papers must be filed by September 26, 2012. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
